items.summary: Rewrite frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx with a fully opaque navy (#0D1B4B) background that is never transparent, even when rendered over a dark hero image. The navbar must have a solid background-color at all times — do not use bg-transparent, bg-opacity-*, or any backdrop-blur that could cause the navbar content to visually disappear against dark page backgrounds. Set an explicit z-index (e.g. z-50) so the navbar always renders above page content.

In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, ensure all navigation links and the Login/Logout button are always visible and never clipped or hidden. The desktop nav must use a flex layout with flex-nowrap and sufficient horizontal spacing so all rendered items fit in a single row. The three conditional nav links must be: 'Home' (always visible, navigates to /), 'Dashboard' (visible only when authenticated, navigates to /dashboard), and 'Admin Panel' (visible only when authenticated AND isAdmin is true, navigates to /admin). The Login/Logout button must always appear on the far right. No link or button must overflow, wrap, or be hidden at any viewport width on desktop (md and above).

In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, fix the mobile hamburger menu to correctly display all conditional links against the opaque navy background. The mobile dropdown menu must have a solid opaque navy (#0D1B4B) background (not transparent) so links are readable. Include the same conditional link set as desktop: 'Home' (always), 'Dashboard' (authenticated only), 'Admin Panel' (authenticated + isAdmin only), plus the Login/Logout action. The hamburger icon and the mobile dropdown must be clearly visible on all page backgrounds including dark hero images.

In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, ensure the useIsCallerAdmin query is called at the top level of the component. Derive isAdmin = data === true. Render the 'Admin Panel' link in both desktop nav and mobile hamburger menu only when the user is authenticated AND isAdmin === true AND the query is not in a loading/fetching state. Remove any console.log or debug statements from prior iterations. The three nav links must be exactly: 'Home' (always visible), 'Dashboard' (authenticated only), 'Admin Panel' (authenticated + isAdmin only).
